name: Immich
description: Self-hosted photo & video library with mobile apps that back up my phone's camera roll. The curated album behind this site's /photos page lives here.

name: Calibre-web-automated
description: Ebook library and reader — drop a file in the ingest folder and it gets parsed, tagged, and shelved. Pairs with my Hardcover list to feed this site's /bookshelf.

name: Nextcloud
description: Files, calendar, and contacts for the household. Replaces the bits of iCloud/Google I'd rather keep at home.
